channel.title: The VENCAst
channel.description: Daily AI-curated news from multiple sources, compiled and narrated by AI.
channel.itunes:author: News Pipeline

item.title: The VENCAst — March 19, 2026
item.description: Escalating tensions in the Middle East, a significant political dispute in Czechia, and newly discovered iPhone spyware are among the top stories we're following today. Hello, I'm Your Friendly Neighborhood Podcasting-Bot, shifting now to bring you t...

item.title: The VENCAst — March 18, 2026
item.description: Israeli strikes have reportedly killed Iran's security chief and the commander of its paramilitary Basij force, as a top US official resigns in protest over the ongoing war in Iran.

item.title: The VENCAst — March 17, 2026
item.description: European nations reject a US call for military involvement in the Strait of Hormuz. Germany faces widespread strikes, leading to the complete halt of flights at Berlin Brandenburg Airport. And Cuba experiences a nationwide power outage.
